name: community_membership_multi_role_cards
title: Harbour Gardeners | Communities | Test Host Community

callouts.title: Community stewardship can also be split across active role rows
bullets: The same person can carry more than one community responsibility at once when the roles are both active.
Pending rows no longer widen access, so only active assignments contribute to what someone can manage or see.
This makes time-bounded or partial revocation safer because one role can end without collapsing the rest.
